titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Office of Alumni Affairs. Cornell Club regional records41-6-635
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Eileen Keating

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-04-03 23:20:59 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Office of Alumni Affairs. Cornell Club regional records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of Alumni Affairs

did.abstract: Correspondence and records of the Alumni Office and its regional clubs

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and records of the Alumni Office and its regional clubs; include records of Cornell Day celebration also correspondence (1911-1918) concerning the Advisor of Women's position originally held by Mrs.Gertrude S. Martin, including letters from Mrs. Martin and women in various Cornell Clubs to President Schurman expressing their concern that the position was not a faculty one.
Also 5 films from Southwest Regional Office. Various Cornell buttons from the Northeast Regional Office.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of Alumni Affairs. Cornell Club regional records, #41-6-635. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.emph: Box lists for other boxes are not online.

did.unittitle: Committee reports to Board of Directors
Cornell Women's Club of New York City
Cornell Clubs of Penn-York and Ontario County
Cornell Clubs of Skaneateles, Staten Island, Suffolk and Sullivan Counties
Cornell Women's Club of Westchester County
Cornell Women's Club of Westchester County
Cornell Men's Club and Cornell Women's Club Combined of Schenectady
Photographs and programs from various alumni associations around the country
Club organization, presidential dinners, program planning and publicity and attendance
Guide to Cornell Clubs and Alumni Associations
Guide to Cornell Clubs and Alumni Associations
Guide to Cornell Clubs and Alumni Associations
Regional Director's Guide to Cornell Clubs
Thanks to You slide sound show with Joe Leeming and Frank Rhodes
Reunion and various other Cornell buttons
Cornell Women's Club of Norther California
Cornell Club of the Gold Coast

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes mailings, photos, attendees list, etc.

did.unittitle: Cornell Club of the Gold Coast

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes mailings, photos, attendees list, etc.

did.unittitle: Cornell Club of the New Haven
Cornell Club of Lackawanna, New Jersey
Cornell Club of Essex Conty, New Jersey
Cornell Club of Trenton, New Jersey
Cornell Women's Club of Central New Jersey
Cornell Women's Club of Elmira, New York
Cornell Alumni Association of Central New York
Cornell Women's Club of Greater Cincinnati

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes founding dates for most clubs and documentation for Batavia, Switzerland, Greater Philadelphia, Syracuse, Northeastern Ohio, Rochester and Washington clubs.
